title: Human Fallopian Tube and Ovary Dissociation for Single Cell RNA-Seq
author: Melissa Javellana
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bfudjns6

steps.title: Prepare 10 mL of Pronase solution...
steps.instruction: Prepare 10 mL of Pronase solution per sample in 50ml LoBind conical : %s %s Primary culture and immortalization of human fallopian tube secretory epithelial cells.. Nature protocols.

steps.title: Prepare 10 mL of digestion buffer...
steps.instruction: Prepare 10 mL of digestion buffer per sample in a 50 mL LoBind conical: %s %s

steps.title: Rinse gross blood off samples with DMEM/10% FBS
steps.instruction: Rinse gross blood off samples with DMEM/10% FBS.

steps.title: Place each sample into 10 mL of Pronase solution
steps.instruction: Place each sample into 10 mL of Pronase solution . Place in 37 °C orbital shaker at 200 rpm for 00:30:00 .

steps.title: Using a 10 ml pipette, triturate...
steps.instruction: Using a 10 ml pipette, triturate tissue to remove loose epithelial fraction. Pass all of the pronase solution through 70 μm filter into new 50 ml LoBind conical and rinse filter with 10 mL DMEM/10%FBS. Recover solid fraction from original conical and/or off of filter. NOTE: You now have an epithelial fraction and a solid fraction . You will continue to process the epithelial fraction and solid fraction separately in the next steps. Both contain potentially unique cell types.

steps.title: Place remaining solid fraction in digestion buffer
steps.instruction: Place remaining solid fraction in digestion buffer . Place on 37 °C orbital shaker at 200 rpm for 00:30:00 to 00:45:00

steps.title: Spin down epithelial fraction at 400 rcf for 00:04:00
steps.instruction: Spin down epithelial fraction at 400 rcf for 00:04:00 . Aspirate and discard supernatant. Re-suspend in 3 mL DMEM/FBS and wait for solid tissue fraction to complete digestion.

steps.title: Pass solid fraction solution through a...
steps.instruction: Pass solid fraction solution through a 70 μm filter into conical containing epithelial fraction and rinse filter with 10 mL DMEM/FBS.

steps.title: Spin down at 400 rcf for 00:04:00
steps.instruction: Spin down at 400 rcf for 00:04:00 . Aspirate and discard supernatant. Re-suspend in 1 mL PBS/0.05% BSA

steps.title: Move solution to Eppendorf tube and add 12 µL 0
steps.instruction: Move solution to Eppendorf tube and add 12 µL 0.5 Molarity (M) EDTA

steps.title: Vortex the EasySep RBC depletion reagent...
steps.instruction: Vortex the EasySep RBC depletion reagent bottle for 00:00:30 to re-suspend

steps.title: Add 25 µL reagent and gentle...
steps.instruction: Add 25 µL reagent and gentle vortex for 00:00:03 until solution appears homogeneous

steps.title: Place on magnet and incubate 00:05:00
steps.instruction: Place on magnet and incubate 00:05:00

steps.title: Leaving on magnet, pipet off clear solution
steps.instruction: Leaving on magnet, pipet off clear solution

steps.title: Re-suspend in pre-warmed 37 °C DMEM/10%FBS
steps.instruction: Re-suspend in pre-warmed 37 °C DMEM/10%FBS.

steps.title: Note
steps.instruction: Note: Keep all solutions at 37 °C throughout protocol.

steps.title: Fallopian tube isthmus
steps.instruction: Fallopian tube isthmus: bivalve

steps.title: Fallopian tube ampulla
steps.instruction: Fallopian tube ampulla: bivalve

steps.title: Fallopian tube fimbriae
steps.instruction: Fallopian tube fimbriae : leave whole

steps.title: Ovary
steps.instruction: Ovary: mince 100 mg tissue into 1-2 mm pieces.

steps.title: Assess viabilty with trypan blue if...
steps.instruction: Assess viabilty with trypan blue if proceeding immediately to single cell library creation or method of choice if optimizing protocol.
